since_last: 66% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.07%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC +0.25% · Gold -1.53% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 66% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.07%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.07%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +8.84%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +8.84%, MU +5.01%, ARM +4.12%, MRVL +2.30%, VRT +2.26%. Laggards: EQIX -4.12%, PLTR -1.93%, SAP -1.76%, NOW -1.61%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.87% at $154.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
